name: LOBABY
description: An enterprise-grade decentralized AI-driven token protocol built on next-gen blockchain infrastructure, establishing an unprecedented benchmark for technological innovation and intelligent value ecology. The development team has fully donated all locked funds and token reserves, with no private reservations, no team shareholdings, and no centralized control—achieving complete on-chain decentralization and genuine community autonomy. Each transaction automatically triggers a precise 2% deflationary burn mechanism, permanently reducing total supply and enhancing long-term scarcity through unchangeable smart contract logic. As a core derivative of Lobster Coin and an upgraded AI iteration of Lobster AI, Lobaby represents the most advanced, powerful, and revolutionary blockchain application in the ecosystem. It serves as the strongest successor and core force of the Lobster family, leading the next wave of intelligent blockchain evolution and unlocking the future of decentralized artificial intelligence.
